name: bnb-staking-validation-lane

network.chain: BNB Smart Chain / BNB Chain staking ecosystem
network.purpose: Add BNB staking validation as an optional validator research lane for SkyGrid telemetry and proof checks.

validationChecks: Confirm official BNB staking documentation and supported wallet flow.
Confirm chain ID and RPC endpoint before any wallet interaction.
Confirm validator identity, commission, voting power, uptime, and slashing/unstake rules.
Confirm minimum delegation and lock/unbonding period.
Confirm whether staking is liquid, native, custodial, or delegated.
Confirm all transactions are prepared unsigned first.
Require Rainbow/connected wallet manual signature for any live transaction.
Record tx hash only after operator signs and explorer confirms success.

integrationTargets.dashboard: Add BNB staking lane as read-only candidate validator panel before any staking action.

notes: This config stages BNB staking validation research only. It does not stake BNB, move funds, approve tokens, or create custody.
